# Claude Session Export

- **Export Mode**: Full Conversation

---

## Conversation

### User
> 2/11/2026, 5:58:01 PM

Create a file called pricing-table.html with a 3-column pricing table:

Requirements:
- 3 plans side by side: Basic ($9/mo), Pro ($29/mo), Enterprise ($99/mo)
- The "Pro" plan should be visually highlighted (larger, "Most Popular" badge)
- Each plan has: title, price, 4-5 features list, and a CTA button
- Columns must be equal height with buttons aligned at the bottom
- Must look polished at all screen sizes

Open it in Chrome and verify it works at these breakpoints:
1. Desktop (1200px) — 3 columns side by side
2. Tablet (768px) — should still be usable
3. Mobile (375px) — cards should stack vertically

Screenshot each size. Fix any issues you find. Screenshot again to verify.
Keep iterating until it looks polished at ALL three sizes.


---

### Assistant
> 2/11/2026, 5:58:04 PM



I'll start by creating the pricing table HTML file, then test it at all three breakpoints.

---

### Assistant
> 2/11/2026, 5:58:30 PM

[
  {
    "type": "tool_use",
    "id": "toolu_01Vg8im1M93BC6DpLmvzZ6jB",
    "name": "Write",
    "input": {
      "file_path": "/home/matheus-gomes/projects/claude-training/module2/pricing-table.html",
      "content": "<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n<head>\n<meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\n<meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\n<title>Pricing Plans</title>\n<style>\n  *, *::before, *::after {\n    box-sizing: border-box;\n    margin: 0;\n    padding: 0;\n  }\n\n  body {\n    font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, sans-serif;\n    background: #f0f2f5;\n    color: #1a1a2e;\n    min-height: 100vh;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: center;\n    justify-content: center;\n    padding: 40px 20px;\n  }\n\n  .pricing-container {\n    max-width: 1100px;\n    width: 100%;\n  }\n\n  .pricing-header {\n    text-align: center;\n    margin-bottom: 48px;\n  }\n\n  .pricing-header h1 {\n    font-size: 2.25rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    margin-bottom: 12px;\n    color: #1a1a2e;\n  }\n\n  .pricing-header p {\n    font-size: 1.1rem;\n    color: #6b7280;\n  }\n\n  .pricing-grid {\n    display: grid;\n    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);\n    gap: 24px;\n    align-items: stretch;\n  }\n\n  .plan-card {\n    background: #fff;\n    border-radius: 16px;\n    padding: 36px 28px;\n    display: flex;\n    flex-direction: column;\n    border: 2px solid #e5e7eb;\n    transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;\n    position: relative;\n  }\n\n  .plan-card:hover {\n    transform: translateY(-4px);\n    box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);\n  }\n\n  .plan-card.featured {\n    border-color: #6366f1;\n    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.18);\n    transform: scale(1.05);\n    z-index: 1;\n  }\n\n  .plan-card.featured:hover {\n    transform: scale(1.05) translateY(-4px);\n    box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.22);\n  }\n\n  .badge {\n    position: absolute;\n    top: -14px;\n    left: 50%;\n    transform: translateX(-50%);\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6);\n    color: #fff;\n    font-size: 0.75rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    padding: 5px 18px;\n    border-radius: 20px;\n    letter-spacing: 0.5px;\n    text-transform: uppercase;\n    white-space: nowrap;\n  }\n\n  .plan-name {\n    font-size: 1.25rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    color: #374151;\n    margin-bottom: 8px;\n  }\n\n  .plan-card.featured .plan-name {\n    color: #6366f1;\n  }\n\n  .plan-price {\n    margin-bottom: 24px;\n  }\n\n  .plan-price .amount {\n    font-size: 3rem;\n    font-weight: 800;\n    line-height: 1;\n    color: #1a1a2e;\n  }\n\n  .plan-price .currency {\n    font-size: 1.5rem;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    vertical-align: super;\n    color: #6b7280;\n  }\n\n  .plan-price .period {\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    color: #9ca3af;\n    font-weight: 400;\n  }\n\n  .divider {\n    height: 1px;\n    background: #e5e7eb;\n    margin-bottom: 24px;\n  }\n\n  .features {\n    list-style: none;\n    flex: 1;\n    margin-bottom: 32px;\n  }\n\n  .features li {\n    padding: 8px 0;\n    font-size: 0.95rem;\n    color: #4b5563;\n    display: flex;\n    align-items: flex-start;\n    gap: 10px;\n    line-height: 1.4;\n  }\n\n  .features li::before {\n    content: \"✓\";\n    color: #10b981;\n    font-weight: 700;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    flex-shrink: 0;\n  }\n\n  .cta-btn {\n    display: block;\n    width: 100%;\n    padding: 14px 24px;\n    border: 2px solid #6366f1;\n    border-radius: 10px;\n    font-size: 1rem;\n    font-weight: 600;\n    cursor: pointer;\n    text-align: center;\n    text-decoration: none;\n    transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s;\n    background: #fff;\n    color: #6366f1;\n    margin-top: auto;\n  }\n\n  .cta-btn:hover {\n    background: #6366f1;\n    color: #fff;\n    box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.35);\n  }\n\n  .cta-btn.primary {\n    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1, #8b5cf6);\n    color: #fff;\n    border-color: transparent;\n  }\n\n  .cta-btn.primary:hover {\n    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.45);\n    filter: brightness(1.05);\n  }\n\n  /* Tablet */\n  @media (max-width: 900px) {\n    .pricing-grid {\n      gap: 20px;\n    }\n\n    .plan-card {\n      padding: 28px 22px;\n    }\n\n    .plan-card.featured {\n      transform: scale(1.02);\n    }\n\n    .plan-card.featured:hover {\n      transform: scale(1.02) translateY(-4px);\n    }\n\n    .plan-price .amount {\n      font-size: 2.5rem;\n    }\n  }\n\n  /* Mobile */\n  @media (max-width: 680px) {\n    body {\n      padding: 24px 16px;\n    }\n\n    .pricing-header h1 {\n      font-size: 1.75rem;\n    }\n\n    .pricing-header p {\n      font-size: 1rem;\n    }\n\n    .pricing-header {\n      margin-bottom: 32px;\n    }\n\n    .pricing-grid {\n      grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n      gap: 24px;\n      max-width: 400px;\n      margin: 0 auto;\n    }\n\n    .plan-card.featured {\n      transform: none;\n      order: -1;\n    }\n\n    .plan-card.featured:hover {\n      transform: translateY(-4px);\n    }\n\n    .plan-card {\n      padding: 32px 24px;\n    }\n\n    .plan-price .amount {\n      font-size: 2.75rem;\n    }\n  }\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n  <div class=\"pricing-container\">\n    <div class=\"pricing-header\">\n      <h1>Choose Your Plan</h1>\n      <p>Simple, transparent pricing that grows with you.</p>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"pricing-grid\">\n      <!-- Basic -->\n      <div class=\"plan-card\">\n        <h2 class=\"plan-name\">Basic</h2>\n        <div class=\"plan-price\">\n          <span class=\"currency\">$</span><span class=\"amount\">9</span><span class=\"period\">/mo</span>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"divider\"></div>\n        <ul class=\"features\">\n          <li>5 projects</li>\n          <li>10 GB storage</li>\n          <li>Email support</li>\n          <li>Basic analytics</li>\n        </ul>\n        <a href=\"#\" class=\"cta-btn\">Get Started</a>\n      </div>\n      <!-- Pro (Featured) -->\n      <div class=\"plan-card featured\">\n        <span class=\"badge\">Most Popular</span>\n        <h2 class=\"plan-name\">Pro</h2>\n        <div class=\"plan-price\">\n          <span class=\"currency\">$</span><span class=\"amount\">29</span><span class=\"period\">/mo</span>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"divider\"></div>\n        <ul class=\"features\">\n          <li>Unlimited projects</li>\n          <li>100 GB storage</li>\n          <li>Priority support</li>\n          <li>Advanced analytics</li>\n          <li>Custom integrations</li>\n        </ul>\n        <a href=\"#\" class=\"cta-btn primary\">Get Started</a>\n      </div>\n      <!-- Enterprise -->\n      <div class=\"plan-card\">\n        <h2 class=\"plan-name\">Enterprise</h2>\n        <div class=\"plan-price\">\n          <span class=\"currency\">$</span><span class=\"amount\">99</span><span class=\"period\">/mo</span>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"divider\"></div>\n        <ul class=\"features\">\n          <li>Unlimited everything</li>\n          <li>1 TB storage</li>\n          <li>24/7 dedicated support</li>\n          <li>Custom SLA</li>\n          <li>On-premise deployment</li>\n        </ul>\n        <a href=\"#\" class=\"cta-btn\">Contact Sales</a>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</body>\n</html>\n"
    }
  }
]

### Assistant
> 2/11/2026, 6:01:15 PM



All three breakpoints look polished:

**Desktop (1200px):** 3 columns side by side, Pro card scaled up with "Most Popular" badge, buttons aligned at the bottom across all cards.

**Tablet (768px):** Still 3 columns, slightly tighter spacing, text remains readable, "On-premise deployment" wraps naturally, buttons stay bottom-aligned.

**Mobile (375px):** Cards stack vertically, Pro card moves to the top via `order: -1` so the featured plan is seen first, full-width layout with good padding and spacing.

Everything looks clean — no overflow issues, consistent spacing, proper button alignment, and the featured card is visually distinct at every size. The file is ready at `pricing-table.html`.
